---
name: Bug report
about: A script errors, misbehaves, or doesn't do what the help says
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**Which script?**
<!-- e.g. ad/Disable-InactiveADUser.ps1 -->

**What happened?**
<!-- What did you run, and what went wrong? Paste the command and the error message. -->

**What did you expect?**

**Environment**
- PowerShell version: <!-- run $PSVersionTable.PSVersion -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. Windows Server 2025, Windows 11 -->
- Relevant module version (if any): <!-- e.g. ActiveDirectory -->

**Reminder:** please scrub any real host names, domains, usernames, or IPs from your output
before pasting. Use placeholders like `DC01` / `corp.example.lab`.
